lanes.label: Build Lane
lanes.description: Implementation-oriented changes including code, schema, UI, config, integrations, and workflow work.

lanes.label: System Lane
lanes.description: System topology, orchestrator behavior, first-class agent changes, lifecycle changes, and control-plane evolution.

lanes.label: Canon Lane
lanes.description: Constitutional changes to ontology, authority, proposal rules, governance, audit, and promotion behavior.

lanes.label: Audit Lane
lanes.description: Risk findings, remediation packets, compliance checks, and audit records.

lanes.label: Promotion Lane
lanes.description: Promotion-ready packages, final human approval, rejection, rollback initiation, and snapshot creation.
